nasb.text: “Then it shall be, when you enter the land which the Lord your God gives you as an inheritance, and you possess it and live in it,

esv.text: “When you come into the land that the Lord your God is giving you for an inheritance and have taken possession of it and live in it,

cnv.text: “將來，你進了耶和華你的　神賜給你作產業的地，佔領那地，並且住在那裡以後，

ccb.text: “你们进入你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们作产业的土地，征服那里，安居下来以后，
